title: Longnian
description: Professor Longnian Lin, PhD, is an Affiliated Professor of Neuroscience at NYU Shanghai, the Director of the Key Laboratory of Brain Functional Genomics at the Ministry of Education, and the Deputy Director of the Institute of Brain and Education Innovation at East China Normal University (ECNU).
text:
Longnian Lin
Professor Longnian Lin, PhD, is an Affiliated Professor of Neuroscience at NYU Shanghai, the Director of the Key Laboratory of Brain Functional Genomics at the Ministry of Education, and the Deputy Director of the Institute of Brain and Education Innovation at East China Normal University (ECNU). Between 2002 and 2004, he went to a postdoctoral program at the Department of Molecular Biology at Princeton University. In 2004, he returned to China to preside over the construction of brain coding analysis technology platform and serves as head of the brain coding laboratory.
